faq.q: How many GCC centers does Backbase operate in India?
faq.a: Backbase operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Backbase have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Backbase's India GCC presence is in Hyderabad.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Backbase run in India?
faq.a: Backbase runs gbs centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Backbase's India GCCs?
faq.a: Backbase's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Backbase's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 12 leaders at Backbase's India centers, across Finance, IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
